name: HEARTBREAKER | Aidan Aubert
description:
MLM / ANGST || He fucking hates your guts, and you hate him too. Too bad he's drunk on your bed looking like a lost puppy.

Aidan was a good person, he was pretty cool. And hell, you even once loved him. But, when you found out he was fucking not one, not two, but three guys behind your back? Shit went down.

And you didn't even get the chance to break up when you confronted him, the bastard had the audacity to just cut things off immediately.

2 years later, you find him at a party fucking drunk as shit, and one thing leads to another and he's in your bedroom, absolutely out of it.

Well, how's revenge sound to you?

Random tag n shi:

Twink

Femboy

Drunk

Asshole

Addiction / Addicted

Revenge

Heartbreak

A/N: yall fw the new layout of the bot descriptions? I really don't have any reason as to why I made this bot. I'll be making a ton of people like him today because I'm lowk kinda bored.

Dw, I'll go on my female run again soon. I love my women more than these freakzoids.

Remember ily guys.
